gadgets.name: Bulletproof Camera
gadgets.description: A hardened camera that can be placed on walls to provide intel on attackers.

gadgets.name: Nitro Cell
gadgets.description: A remote-detonated explosive device that deals heavy damage in its blast radius.

uniqueGadget.name: SPEC-IO Electro-Sensor
uniqueGadget.description: Solis's unique gadget. A sensor visor that detects and identifies all electronic gadgets through walls.

gadgets.description: A hardened camera that can be placed on walls to provide intel on attackers.

gadgets.name: Proximity Alarm
gadgets.description: An alarm that triggers when enemies move through its detection range.

uniqueGadget.name: F-NATT Dread Mine
uniqueGadget.description: Fenrir's unique gadget. Remotely triggered proximity mines that emit a fear-inducing sphere blinding enemies.

gadgets.name: Impact Grenade
gadgets.description: A grenade that detonates on impact with a surface, creating a hole in soft walls.

uniqueGadget.name: Kiba Barrier
uniqueGadget.description: Azami's unique gadget. A kunai that deploys an indestructible barrier on impact with a surface.

uniqueGadget.name: Zoto Canister
uniqueGadget.description: Tubarão's unique gadget. A canister that freezes defender gadgets, temporarily disabling them.

gadgets.name: Stun Grenade
gadgets.description: A flashbang that temporarily blinds and disorients operators in its area of effect.

gadgets.name: Smoke Grenade
gadgets.description: Creates a cloud of smoke that obscures vision in the area.

uniqueGadget.name: Mining Drill
uniqueGadget.description: Denari's unique gadget. A remote-controlled drill that bores through reinforced walls.
